interview_rounds: Loop Interviews x4 (coding + behavioral per round)
Bar Raiser Round (behavioral heavy, LP focused)
focus_areas: Leadership Principles (14 LPs — know all of them)
STAR method for every behavioral question
top_problems: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
tips: Every answer must map to a Leadership Principle.
Be specific: dates, metrics, impact. Vague answers fail.
For system design: start with requirements, then scale.
Amazon loves trees and graphs — practice traversals cold.
